title: MOSPF (Multicast Open Shortest Path First) Operation
description: A visual explanation of how MOSPF builds and uses a multicast delivery tree based on the underlying OSPF unicast topology.
relationships: Router 1 is the source for multicast group G
Routers 4 and 3 have directly connected receivers for group G
All routers calculate a shortest-path tree (SPT) rooted at the source using the Dijkstra algorithm
Multicast traffic flows from the source along the branches of the SPT to the receivers
